title: 函館スプリントSの後に・カワイイ魅力

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite finishing the Hakodate Sprint Stakes,
Curren Chan feels a little underwhelmed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when she sees the passionate response
from her fans on Umatter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She remembers that she only needs a moment to
captivate people's hearts in a sprint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she doesn't want her fame to end as quickly
as a sprint does. She wants to keep drawing in
fans with her cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that as her overall goal, she heads to
summer camp to prepare for the Sprinters Stakes.
